evals.name: meter-simple-single-part
evals.prompt: We need a Meter component in our design system (@workspace/ui) — like a progress bar but for a static measured value (battery level, disk usage, score out of 100). Add it.
evals.expected_output: packages/ui/src/components/meter.tsx wrapping @base-ui/react/meter, mirroring progress.tsx, with data-slot on each part, radius/color via tokens, no Radix imports, typechecks.

evals.name: number-field-compound-input
evals.prompt: Add a number field component to packages/ui — a numeric input with increment and decrement stepper buttons. We'll use it for quantity pickers.
evals.expected_output: packages/ui/src/components/number-field.tsx wrapping @base-ui/react/number-field with Group/Input/Increment/Decrement parts, each with data-slot, reusing the input + button focus/border/press conventions, no Radix imports, typechecks.

evals.name: toolbar-compound
evals.prompt: Can you add a Toolbar component to the design system? Something to group buttons, toggles, and separators into a horizontal bar.
evals.expected_output: packages/ui/src/components/toolbar.tsx wrapping @base-ui/react/toolbar with Root/Button/Separator/Group parts, each with data-slot, button focus/invalid/press + icon conventions, radius/color via tokens, no Radix imports, typechecks.
